ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "run_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the run or experiment */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition under which the experiment was conducted */,
  "developmental_stage" TEXT /* Developmental stage of the pathogen */,
  "host_compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility of the host with the pathogen */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the host plant species */,
  "geographic_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic location where the study was conducted */,
  "isolate_id" TEXT /* Reference to the pathogen isolate */,
  "isolation_source" TEXT /* Source from which the isolate was obtained */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., field, lab) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional comments or observations */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the study */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_geographic_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("geographic_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_isolate_id FOREIGN KEY ("isolate_id") REFERENCES isolates ("isolate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each run or experiment */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study or experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the run */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the run (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional comments or observations */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the run */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "environmental_factors" TEXT /* Environmental factors affecting the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Common name of the host plant */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the host plant */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the host plant */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the host plant */,
  "genetic_modification" INTEGER /* Indicates if the host plant has been genetically modified */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional comments or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isolates" (
  "isolate_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each isolate */,
  "isolate_name" TEXT /* Name of the isolate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from which the isolate was obtained */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the isolate was collected */,
  "genetic_sequence" TEXT /* Genetic sequence of the isolate */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional comments or observations */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the isolate record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the isolate record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the isolate record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the isolate record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isolate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the study was conducted */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the study was conducted */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional comments or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional comments or observations */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
